name: AddGameobjectEvent
description: Adds a new gameobject to the scene

name: DeleteGameobjectEvent
description: Deletes an existing gameobject from the scene

name: AttachComponentEvent
description: Adds the component, if not exists, to the specified gameobject

name: DetachComponentEvent
description: removes the component, if not exists, from the specified gameobject

name: UpdateComponentEvent
description: updates the component, if not exists, from the specified gameobject
